engineeringMilestones.title: Helmet Violation Detection System
engineeringMilestones.description: Computer vision workflow for identifying rider safety compliance from visual input.
engineeringMilestones.impact: Demonstrates applied object detection thinking for civic and safety-oriented use cases.

engineeringMilestones.title: AI Meeting & Lecture Note Taker
engineeringMilestones.description: AI productivity system for converting spoken or long-form sessions into structured notes.
engineeringMilestones.impact: Shows product thinking around summarization, knowledge capture, and student workflows.

engineeringMilestones.title: Wildlife Species Identification
engineeringMilestones.description: Image intelligence concept for classifying wildlife species from visual evidence.
engineeringMilestones.impact: Connects machine learning foundations with conservation-oriented recognition systems.

engineeringMilestones.title: AI Plant Disease Detection
engineeringMilestones.description: Agriculture-focused AI system for recognizing plant disease signals from images.
engineeringMilestones.impact: Highlights ability to translate AI models into practical diagnosis support tools.

learningSignals.title: AI Engineering
learningSignals.description: Building applied systems around summarization, classification, and intelligent automation.
learningSignals.evidence: AI note-taking, plant disease detection, and vision-based project work.

learningSignals.title: Full Stack Development

learningSignals.title: System Design
learningSignals.description: Practicing modular architecture, loader contracts, feature isolation, and scalable content models.

learningSignals.title: Computer Vision
learningSignals.description: Exploring detection and classification workflows for real-world visual intelligence.

learningSignals.title: Backend Engineering
